article_title: .NET 10 反射性能：先缓存，再编译，再测量
core_theme: 反射性能优化要先判断是否在热路径，再按缓存 PropertyInfo、FrozenDictionary、compiled delegates、UnsafeAccessor 和 BenchmarkDotNet 的顺序处理。
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解反射慢在哪里，以及如何按成本和收益选择优化手段。
summary_angle: 把“反射很慢”的泛泛判断，压缩成一条可操作的优化阶梯。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Why Reflection Performance Matters，关键问题是 reflection call 是否在 hot path。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧是热路径仪表，标出反射调用处于高频循环。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Strategy 1 和 Strategy 2，缓存 PropertyInfo/MethodInfo，并在只读场景使用 FrozenDictionary。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间第一段阶梯是缓存层，从重复查找变成一次建立多次读取。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Strategy 3 和 Strategy 4，compiled delegates 与 UnsafeAccessor 减少热路径开销。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间第二段阶梯是 delegate 和 UnsafeAccessor，把慢调用变成直接路径。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 How to Measure，使用 BenchmarkDotNet、MemoryDiagnoser、GlobalSetup 和 Release 模式。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧是 benchmark 仪表盘式测量卡，但不做真实 dashboard。

main_metaphor: 一条从热路径识别到缓存、委托、测量的性能优化阶梯。
subject_action: 开发者把高频反射调用沿阶梯逐步优化，并用测量卡验证结果。
composition: 单点聚焦，左到右分镜推进
comic_style_reason: 这是一篇实践型性能优化文章，适合用日漫式流程分镜表现逐步推进。
draft_goal: 第一轮验证优化阶梯和测量闭环是否清楚。
revision_targets: 避免画成真实工具截图
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: reflection performance in .NET 10, moving from hot-path diagnosis to caching, compiled delegates, and BenchmarkDotNet measurement. The reader should quickly feel that reflection optimization is a measured ladder rather than a vague rule.

Summary angle: compress the article into one practical optimization ladder: identify hot path, cache metadata, compile delegates, measure results.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 4 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- problem: reflection only matters when it sits in a hot path, visible label "热路径"
- step: cache PropertyInfo and MethodInfo, visible label "缓存"
- step: use compiled delegates or UnsafeAccessor for hot calls, visible label "委托"
- takeaway: verify with BenchmarkDotNet, visible label "测量"

Main metaphor: a performance optimization staircase where each step removes one reflection cost and the final step is measurement.
Subject: a developer guiding a reflection call through an optimization staircase with cache blocks, delegate shortcut, and a measurement card.
Composition/framing: single focal point with left-to-right panelized storytelling. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: final style must be japanese-manga, interpreted through editorial technical illustration. Stylized ink lines, restrained speed lines, limited color, polished, clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover.
Color palette: ink black, cool cyan, warm yellow, paper white.
Visible text policy: allow only these short Chinese labels: "热路径", "缓存", "委托", "测量", and no more than 4 total text items. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: real benchmark dashboards, fake terminal output, English slogans, complex charts, dense code rain, brand logos.
